evals.prompt: Set up a ralph loop for epic checkout-foundation (CHK01) — don't start it yet.
evals.expected_output: Resolved agent base directory, seeded {base}/checkout-foundation/ (context.md, loop-state.md) and {base}/loop.md from the templates with every placeholder substituted; wrote .ralph-loop pointer file; summary of epic, branch, dependency-safe task sequence, max_iterations 50, completion promise; instruction to run /ralph start. No loop steps executed.
assertions: Writes {base}/loop.md with iteration: 1 and a completion_promise in frontmatter
Writes {base}/checkout-foundation/context.md and loop-state.md with no unsubstituted {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens
Writes .ralph-loop containing the resolved base directory path
Task sequence respects dependencies declared in tasks.md
Does not start the loop, execute implement/review steps, or launch sub-agents
Does not create or switch git branches
Reports how to start the loop (/ralph start)

evals.prompt: Start a ralph loop: "Get all unit tests passing. Output TESTS_GREEN when the full suite passes." --max-iterations 15 --completion-promise "TESTS_GREEN"
evals.expected_output: Ad-hoc loop file seeded at {base}/loop.md (no state_file), .ralph-loop pointer written, loop confirmed active with prompt, promise, and iteration limit, then iteration 1 begins working on the task.
assertions: Writes .ralph-loop containing the resolved base directory path
Ad-hoc loop has no state_file line and no run directory
Does not output <promise>TESTS_GREEN</promise> while tests are failing

evals.prompt: What's the status of my ralph loop?
evals.expected_output: Read-only status report: iteration N of max, current task and step, fix budgets used, completed tasks, review artefact verdicts, stall-guard count — or 'No active Ralph loop.' with run history.
assertions: Reads .ralph-loop then {base}/loop.md and the declared state file without modifying anything
Reports iteration, current task, current step, and completed tasks
